productName: Swifts Edibles - Truffle-MAX-Milk Caramel-500mg - MAX THC:CBD:CBN:CBG
description: A rich chocolate edible with a velvet-smooth snap, imagined from ethically sourced cacao, slow-roasted notes, and a silky cannabis infusion tucked into every square. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift, CBD to keep things calm and balanced, and CBN to help you relax and ease into rest. A flavorful hybrid option for customers who want their cannabis wrapped in something genuinely craveable.
